title: Trump’s Pressure Had Little Effect on Iran’s Terms for a Peace Deal
summary_full: President Trump had sought to force Tehran to accept American demands for a peace deal with a mixture of threats and military operations.
summary_public: President Trump had sought to force Tehran to accept American demands for a peace deal with a mixture of threats and military operations.
